Bench Warrant Recalled
Bench Warrant Issued
DEFT ATC MOT TO RBW, WITHDRAW PLEA & DISMISS DUE TO CLIENT PASSING FILED
CHANGE OF PLEA TX EFILED
CO-DEFT; FORSTE/MATHEW #21000630
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RECALL AND RECEIPT OF DEATH CERTIFICATE/X:THE PEOPLE CONFIRM THEY ARE IN RECEIPT OF A COPY OF A DEATH CERTIFICATE,/BWR:09-22-21/BWR1/DEFT DECEASED/NP/MO PC 1385/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X:THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO ADD COUNT 3, A MISDEMEANOR CHARGE OF 459PC IN THE SECOND DEGREE, IS GRANTED/IRRC/TEXT:DEFTADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/REMA/ARBUCKLE/IBARRA/TWS/DOP/

/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/CTORD: CURFEW, REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN THE INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE DURING THE FOLLOWING HOURS: 9PM-6AM/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP//X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X:DEFENDANT'S APPERANCE IS WAIVED ON 05-06-21/

/CAL:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT RETURN/NP/X:THE BAILIFF INDICATES DEFENDANT REFUSED TO APPEAR IN COURT TODAY,/CTORD:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT DISCHARGED/NB/X:COURT SETS BAIL WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE ON 04-28-21 IN DEPARTMENT 11 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:DEFENDANT APPEARED IN COURT LATE, COURT PERMANENTLY STAYS PREVIOUSLY ORDERED BENCH WARRANT,/CTORD:CASE DEEMED A LOVE WAIVER/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE IN DEPARTMENT 11/DOPU:POSITIVE ACM,/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWT/X:COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO GRANT THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S ORAL MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE DUE TO WITNESS UNAVAILABILITY,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIALMONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH (A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOPC/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX: 03-05-21 (30TH)/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA2: 3229 STEINER STREET, SF, CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING, CO-DEFT 21000630/TE: 90 MINUTES COMBINED WITH 21000630/DOP/

/CAL:SENTENCING/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:5,000/BWNUM:1ST/X: 2ND OF 2 BENCHWARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/
